parameters.content:
## 🗄️ Airtable Setup

**Table 1: `Clients`**

| Field | Type |
|---|---|
| `active` | Single line text (`yes` / `no`) |
| `site_name` | Single line text |
| `umami_site_id` | Single line text |
| `email` | Email |
| `slack_webhook` | URL |
| `language` | Single line text (`en`, `bs-latin`, `hr`, `sr-latin`, `sr-cyrillic`, `mk`) |
| `history_summary` | Long text (auto-updated by workflow) |

**Table 2: `History`**

| Field | Type |
|---|---|
| `client_id` | Single line text |
| `site_name` | Single line text |
| `period` | Single line text |
| `visitors` | Number |
| `visitors_wow` | Number |
| `organic_visitors` | Number |
| `bounce_rate` | Number |
| `summary` | Long text |
| `report_text` | Long text |

**Get your Airtable API key:**
airtable.com/create/tokens
Scopes needed: `data.records:read` + `data.records:write`

**Get your Base ID:**
From your base URL: `airtable.com/appXXXXXXXXX/...`

## Step 1 — Config
Fill in all values here.
No credentials are stored anywhere else in the workflow.

## Step 2 — Umami Auth
Logs in to Umami and stores
the bearer token for all
subsequent API calls.

## Step 3 — Client Loop
Fetches active clients from Airtable
and loops through one at a time.

The `Has client?` IF node prevents
an empty second pass after the
last client is processed.

## Step 4 — Umami Data
Fetches 4 data points in parallel:
- This week stats (visitors, pageviews, bounce, duration)
- Prior week stats (for week-over-week comparison)
- Top pages by URL path
- Traffic sources by referrer

All 4 results are merged before processing.

## Step 5 — AI Report
Groq (llama-3.3-70b) generates a structured
SEO + AIO report in the client's language.

Report sections:
1. WEEKLY SUMMARY
2. TOP 3 WINS
3. TOP 3 ISSUES
4. SEO RECOMMENDATIONS
5. AIO RECOMMENDATIONS
6. QUICK WIN

Language is set per-client in Airtable.
Supports: `en`, `bs-latin`, `sr-latin`,
`sr-cyrillic`, `hr`, `mk`

## Step 6 — Delivery
Report sent via 3 channels sequentially:
1. **Email** — branded HTML report
2. **Slack** — Block Kit summary card
3. **Airtable** — saved to History table

⚠️ Add your SMTP credential
to the `Send email report` node.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Format data + build AI prompt').item.json.cfg.GROQ_MODEL, max_tokens: $('Format data + build AI prompt').item.json.cfg.GROQ_MAX_TOKENS, temperature: $('Format data + build AI prompt').item.json.cfg.GROQ_TEMPERATURE, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $('Format data + build AI prompt').item.json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $('Format data + build AI prompt').item.json.userMessage }] }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ fields: { client_id: $('Parse + format report').first().json.client._airtable_id, site_name: $('Parse + format report').first().json.client.site_name, period: $('Parse + format report').first().json.meta.period, visitors: $('Parse + format report').first().json.meta.visitors, visitors_wow: $('Parse + format report').first().json.meta.visitors_wow, organic_visitors: $('Parse + format report').first().json.meta.organic_visitors, bounce_rate: $('Parse + format report').first().json.meta.bounce_rate, summary: $('Parse + format report').first().json.historySummary, report_text: $('Parse + format report').first().json.aiText } }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '❌ SEO report workflow error: ' + $json.message }) }}

parameters.content:
# 📊 Weekly SEO Report — Umami + Groq + Airtable

**Who it's for:**
Freelance SEO consultants and digital agencies managing multiple client websites who want automated, AI-written weekly reporting without a paid analytics platform.

**What it does:**
Every Monday at 07:00, this workflow fetches the past 7 days of analytics from your self-hosted Umami instance for each active client in Airtable. It compares visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, and session duration against the prior week, identifies top pages and traffic sources, then sends the data to Groq (Llama 3.3 70B) to generate a structured SEO + AIO report. Delivered via branded HTML email, Slack Block Kit summary, and saved to Airtable history.

---

## ⚙️ Setup — 5 Steps

**1.** Fill in the **Config** node with all your credentials and settings

**2.** Add your **SMTP credential** to the `Send email report` node

**3.** Create two Airtable tables — see the **Airtable Setup** sticky note below

**4.** Add clients to the `Clients` table with `active = yes`

**5.** Run manually to test, then activate the schedule

---

## 📋 Requirements
- Self-hosted Umami (v2+)
- Airtable account (free tier works)
- Groq API key — free at console.groq.com
- SMTP email account
- Self-hosted n8n (v2.3+)
